description_long: This house complex features two distinct structures: a modern, dark gray multi-story building with large windows and a flat roof, and a smaller, wood-paneled building with a fenced yard. The main building includes rooftop gardens, a balcony, and a pool area with outdoor seating. The secondary structure is simpler, with a wooden deck and a small, enclosed yard. The property is surrounded by a variety of trees and shrubs, adding greenery and privacy. The overall design blends contemporary architecture with natural elements, creating a spacious and inviting residential environment. The layout suggests multiple entry points and ample outdoor living space.
description: A modern multi-story house with large windows, rooftop gardens, and a pool, paired with a smaller wood-paneled building and fenced yard, surrounded by trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main dark gray building with large windows, rooftop garden, and the adjacent wood-paneled structure with a fenced yard and several trees.
description_view_1: Rear angle highlighting the pool area, outdoor seating, and the flat roofs of both buildings, with the wood-paneled structure set behind the main house.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the wood-paneled building, its fenced yard, and the back of the main house with visible rooftop features and landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the fenced yard, trees, and the main building's side façade with large windows and rooftop garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a simple modern door, no porch, and minimal overhang, with direct access from the front yard.
